name: Orange Lemon Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the orange and lemon rinds to the melted butter and cream well.
2. Gradually add the egg whites and salt, stirring until combined.
3. Alternately add the confectioners' sugar and fruit juices, beating until smooth and at a spreadable consistency.
4. Add the orange food coloring and mix until desired shade is achieved.
Makes frosting to cover top of 1 8x8x2 inches layer and sides of 2 layers.
